$comment: D-OPT-SWITCH-JUMP-TABLE (c70): a dense switch on an UNSIGNED discriminant [0..15] (16 cases -> jump table). Exercises the ZExt widen path (an unsigned discriminant must zero-extend, not sign-extend, before the bounds arithmetic). Key probe: a high-bit-set unsigned value (0x80000000u) and max unsigned (0xFFFFFFFFu) must route to DEFAULT, not a wrong slot. gcc/clang exit 42 (cross-checked x86_64 -O1, aarch64 -O1 qemu).
